titleStmt.title: SII 38.270: original edition by S. Swaminathan
No. 270.

summary.p: This Telugu inscription of the 16th century A.D. records the construction of Ādikēśavaperumāḷ temple, for the merit of Chennakēśava, to the west of the village Neḍambaram by Lakshmayya. It is stated that he constructed garbha-griha, mahāmaṇḍapa, garuḍa-maṇḍapa, flag staff, bali-pīṭham, prākāra, gōpuram, garuḍa pillar, and sacred tank called Rāmānuja-Pushkarṇi. He is also said to have consecrated the images of gods, and he also excavated a tank and laid a garden.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
mana
ḍu ceṁnnakēśavanāyani
vāru neṁḍaṁbarānki pa
ḍamara pāśaṁcaṁnnakēśava
samudraṁ kāviṁcavalena
ni rāyasaṁtānappiccanu
śelavu Iccināru Āsta
laṁlō vāsaṁ cēsukoni
vuṁḍē komāṁḍu
lakṣamayyagārini pili
piṁci Ā stalāna Ādikē
śava perumāḷla kōvilavu
dhārikaṁ śēṁ Ivalenani
talistimi Aṁduku kāva
lasina rokhaṁ yistunāṁ mīru śarīra prayāsa
paḍineraverca valenani śē
lavu yiccināru Aṁduku
nēnē garbhagṛhaṁ Aṁdumaṁṭṭa
paṁ mahāmaṁṭṭapaṁ garu
ḍa maṁḍḍapaṁ gōḍistaṁbhaṁ
balipīṭhaṁ prākāraṁ gōpu
raṁ garuḍakaṁbhaṁ rāmā
nuja puṣkariṇi dēvatā
pratiṣṭha brahmapratiṣṭha
taṭāka pratiṣṭha vanapra
tiṣṭhayini mōdalayi
na dharmaṁ ceṁnnakēśavanā
yanivārki cēgūḍunu
yī stalāna phalakaṭaḍa
kāpu koḷavāru mōda
layinavāru gānine
laku pātika lekha vi
ku kaṭaḍaṁ kaṭṭināṁ yitī
runa phalasaṭa vāru
mānaṁmmi cucūvuṁḍē
di yī sthalānni svāmino
mudra lakṣmayyagārki
kaṭṭaḍacēstimi mīku
Digital edition of SII 38.270 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
